curation_notes: The patch commit is a merge commit (cfb0fc3) for PR #10. Only one non-test source file was changed: LogNodeUtils.java in the parser package. The fix adds a secureDocumentBuilderFactory method that disables external entities, external DTDs, XInclude, and entity reference expansion, and calls it in getRootDocumentNodeFromArchive before building the XML document. The pre-patch commit 194ae55 is the first parent of the merge commit. Location derived directly from the patch diff.
